context: Tests whether the agent catches stale StoreKit subscription offer APIs and explains current eligibility, promotional offer, analytics, and testing patterns.

checklist.name: Win-back eligibility
checklist.description: Explains that winBackOffers is a raw product offer list and filters it through verified renewalInfo.eligibleWinBackOfferIDs before display or purchase.

checklist.name: Promotional offer APIs
checklist.description: Uses the iOS 26 SwiftUI subscriptionPromotionalOffer closure plus compactJWS closure for StoreKit views, and distinguishes that from lower-level Product.SubscriptionOffer.Signature purchase options.

checklist.name: Applied offer analytics
checklist.description: Uses transaction.offer?.type and transaction.offer?.id instead of stale transaction.offerType or transaction.offerID properties.

checklist.name: Testing guidance
checklist.description: Mentions StoreKit configuration or sandbox testing for promotional, win-back, offer code, Ask to Buy, and renewal-state flows.
